Hold prepare and activate likewise require separate authorization/dispatch/import transitions. None of these intermediate states is Published, reopenable, servable, or pin-releasable except the explicitly named Published/ArtifactVerified states, and no pin release begins before HoldActivated.

`LocalBackupGrantIssueImportSpec` is `{manifest_ref:StrongRef<BackupManifest>,publication_operation_record_ref,publication_dispatch_terminal_evidence_ref,publication_receipt_ref:StrongRef<BackupPublicationReceipt>,transparency:NotRequired{policy_digest}|Included{transparency_operation_record_ref,transparency_dispatch_terminal_evidence_ref,inclusion_ref:StrongRef<BackupTransparencyInclusion>,checkpoint_digest},grant_issue_operation_record_ref:StrongRef<BackupExternalOperationRecord<Local>>,grant_dispatch_terminal_evidence_ref:StrongRef<PortableBackupExternalOperationTerminalEvidence>,archive_retention_grant_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveRetentionGrant>,current_grant_observation_import_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveGrantAuthorityObservationImport<Local>>,resulting_grant_projection_body_recipe,expected_registry_state:GrantIssueAuthorizedUndispatched,terminal_audit_gate}`. The grant subject must byte-match the selected policy arm and therefore cannot predate required inclusion; apply constructs the direct current `ArchiveGrantAuthorityProjection<Local>` and installs Published atomically, without naming its future result. `LocalBackupArtifactVerifySpec` consumes the exact current-use guard and installs ArtifactVerified. The hold prepare/activate import specs likewise construct their direct-successor projection bodies. `LocalBackupReleaseSpec` names the pin, manifest, complete publication/transparency/grant/hold operation lineages, artifact proof, Activated hold, fresh release observation import, and expected HoldActivated state; it is the sole pin-removing transition and installs `ReleasedPendingArchiveHoldCompletion`, not final Released. `ArchiveSourceReleaseCompletionImportSpec<Local>` alone installs final Released after the archive authority's completion CAS.

Closure publication is the only Pinned-to-Certified path; seal cannot skip it, required transparency cannot skip inclusion, and release byte-matches the artifact proof, latest grant head, rooted operation/status lineage, and Activated hold. Final Released has no path to the pin/source closure. `LocalBackupAbortSpec` is the only failure transition: before any external operation reaches SentUnknown it requires complete no-publication evidence plus ordered cleanup acknowledgements; after any publication/transparency/grant operation is SentUnknown it must recover that exact operation status and either prove a provider-linearizable terminal cancellation/no-registration result or preserve the possibly advertised envelope and roll forward through every remaining publication, verification, hold-backed source release, and hold completion step. Disconnect, timeout, grant renewal, or a stale Active generation never drops a pin.

Sharded backup begins with `GlobalBackupIntentSpec {backup_id,barrier_global_prefix:P,expected_global_state_root_ref:StrongRef<GlobalStateRoot>,expected_meta_pinned_closure_refs[BackupPinnedClosureRef<Meta>],expected_meta_pinned_closure_coverage_bitmap,expected_topology_ref:StrongRef<TopologyState>,exact_sorted_required_shard_domains[ConsensusDomain],exact_partition_and_authority_commitment,expected_global_history_interval,meta_live_closure_inventory_ref:StrongRef<BackupSourceInventory>,archive_profile_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveProfile>,recipient_and_key_recovery_profile_ref:StrongRef<KeyRecoveryProfile>,format_matrix_ref:StrongRef<FormatMatrix>,terminal_audit_gate}`. The generated Meta closure union includes the exact global checkpoint/vector, current/joint/prospective configurations and floor, and every other live mandatory class; no open `StrongRef[]` profile or floor bag exists. Apply creates `GlobalBackupIntentRecord` strongly pinning the exact Meta closure and fixing `P`, topology/configurations/shards/policy; its later `GlobalBackupIntentCertificate` is quorum-signed under the universal signer lock.

Each required shard orders `ShardBackupPinSpec {intent_ref:CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<GlobalBackupIntentCertificate>,expected_shard_state_ref:StrongRef<ShardLogicalStateRoot>,barrier_state:ExactCurrentPrefix{global_applied_prefix=P}|ExactHistoricalCut{current_global_applied_prefix,historical_state_ref:StrongRef<ShardHistoricalStateAtPrefix>,checkpoint_and_history_proof_ref:StrongRef<ExactHistoricalPrefixProof>},expected_shard_configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>,expected_topology_epoch,expected_pinned_closure_refs[BackupPinnedClosureRef<Shard>],expected_pinned_closure_coverage_bitmap,remote_retention_grant_ref:StrongRef<RemoteRetentionGrantEvidence>}`. There is no `LatestAtLeastP` tag. An irrelevance proof is accepted only inside a contiguous authenticated Global-command coverage proof that reconstructs exact state at `P`. Apply creates `ShardBackupPinRecord` strongly owning the generated-complete state/checkpoint/vector/config/floor/history/prepared/certificate/active-projection/key/derived/trust/retention closure at `P` and records `pin_generation`. `ShardBackupCopyVerification` is `{backup_id,pin_identity:WeakDigest,pin_generation,barrier_global_prefix:P,topology_and_configuration_identities,sorted_source_to_archive_entries,complete_inventory_bijection_proof_ref:StrongRef<BackupInventoryBijectionProof>,per_object_decode_results,recoverability_and_failure_domain_proof_ref:StrongRef<BackupRecoverabilityProof>,content_reopen_proof_ref:StrongRef<BackupContentReopenProof>,canonical_shard_semantic_digest}`. `ShardBackupClosureCertificate` is `{SameGroupCertificateHeader,backup_id,barrier_global_prefix:P,shard_id,source_domain,topology_and_configuration_identities,exact_partition_coverage,source_state:BackupSourceIdentity<ShardLogicalStateRoot>,archived_state_ref:BackupArchiveRef<ShardLogicalStateRoot>,copy_verification_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupCopyVerification>,pinned_closure_digest,active_meta_projection_digest,key_derived_remote_obligation_digests,complete_archive_inventory_digest,inventory_bijection_proof_digest,recoverability_proof_digest,canonical_shard_semantic_digest,content_reopen_proof_digest,certificate_attempt_ref:StrongRef<CertificateAttemptRecord>,canonical_signature_set}` and contains no retaining source-pin edge. `ShardBackupClosurePublishSpec {pin_record_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupPinRecord>,copy_verification_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupCopyVerification>,closure_certificate_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupClosureCertificate>,expected_registry_state:Pinned,expected_pin_generation,expected_barrier_topology_and_configuration,expected_current_root:WeakStateIdentity}` is the only `Pinned -> Certified` transition and byte-matches every field. Shard pins remain until Meta presents the post-publication artifact proof inside the release authorization; content proof alone never releases them.

`GlobalBackupSealSpec {intent_record_ref:StrongRef<GlobalBackupIntentRecord>,exact_sorted_shard_closure_certificate_refs[CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<ShardBackupClosureCertificate>],meta_copy_verification_ref:StrongRef<MetaBackupCopyVerification>,backup_manifest_ref:StrongRef<BackupManifest>,expected_topology_and_configurations,exact_complete_group_and_partition_commitment,terminal_audit_gate}` accepts one certificate from every and only required shard, all at exact `P`; `MetaBackupCopyVerification` has the same typed bijection/recoverability/content-reopen fields and Meta scope as its Local/Shard counterparts.

Meta uses the same rooted sequence. `GlobalBackupPublicationAuthorizeSpec` is the sole Sealed successor and constructs the Meta publication operation; publication receipt import selects `PublicationReceiptedPendingTransparency` or `PublicationReceiptedPendingGrant`. Required transparency and grant issuance each receive their own Meta operation record, Protocol dispatch lineage, portable terminal evidence, and Semantic import. `GlobalBackupGrantIssueImportSpec` requires the intent, manifest, complete publication/transparency operation evidence, exact Active grant, direct current `ArchiveGrantAuthorityProjection<Meta>`, expected manifest body/signature digests, and the matching `GrantIssueAuthorizedUndispatched` state. It alone installs Published and never releases a source pin.

`GlobalBackupArtifactVerifySpec` consumes a current-use guard, verifies the exact post-publication artifact and complete operation/status lineage, and installs ArtifactVerified. `GlobalBackupReleaseAuthorizeSpec` names the intent, manifest, receipt, grant, artifact proof, Activated source-release hold, fresh action-bound observation import, exact shard set, expected ArtifactVerified state, and complete release commitment; apply installs Releasing, and only its later role-valid publication permits construction of the portable `GlobalBackupReleaseAuthorizationCertificate`. Every shard verifies that projection plus a new current hold observation import. `GlobalBackupAbortBeginSpec`, `GlobalBackupAbortFinalizeSpec`, and `ShardBackupAbortSpec` are the exact cleanup transitions only while every external operation is pre-SentUnknown or has provider-linearizable never-published cancellation evidence; otherwise they preserve the possibly advertised envelope and the ordinary required-inclusion, grant, artifact-verification, hold-backed source release, and hold-completion protocol is mandatory.

Abort has exact state-shaped no-publication evidence and is not a timeout shortcut. `BackupNoPublicationProof<Role>` is the closed union `PreSeal{backup_id,expected_registry_generation,zero_manifest_and_publication_operation_proof,current_source_pin_set,prepared/certificate/output roots_scanned,quiescence_barrier_id,checker_version}|SealedPublicationNeverEscaped{backup_id,expected_registry_state:Sealed|PublicationAuthorizedUndispatched,manifest_and_seal_identity,publication_bundle_id,publication_operation_record_identity?,publication_operation_disposition:NoOperationAuthorized|AuthorizedUndispatched{dispatch_never_initialized_proof}|ArmedAbandonedBeforeSend{attempt_identity,DispatchNeverSentProof}|ProviderCancelledBeforePublication{attempt_identity,canonical_full_request_digest,provider_linearizable_cancellation_tombstone},zero_transparency_and_grant_operation_proof,archive_publication_authority_head_and_counter,publication_receipt_nonmembership_proof,current_source_pin_set,prepared/certificate/output roots_scanned,quiescence_barrier_id,checker_version,authority_signatures}`. `ProviderCancelledBeforePublication` is a permanent authority tombstone that rejects any later registration or publication for that operation/idempotency/request lineage; signed NotRegistered after SentUnknown is insufficient and permits only exact retry. Because transparency and grant operations are legal only after a publication receipt, their existence makes no-publication false. A bare local absence, timeout, unavailable status, provider `Requested`, or unresolved SentUnknown cannot inhabit any disposition. Every extant operation ID, idempotency token, request digest, dispatch/status transcript, bundle ID, and authority head is mandatory; any successful receipt or ambiguous external state permanently makes abort illegal and forces roll-forward. `BackupStagingCleanupPlan<Role>` enumerates every staging object/realization/key opener/upload operation and pre-mints one idempotent cleanup operation per owner; each cleanup external effect uses the universal dispatch protocol. `BackupStagingCleanupCompletion` proves an exact one-to-one terminal receipt set and post-cleanup inventory. Neither proof may assert absence after a publication receipt, inclusion, or grant exists.

`LocalBackupAbortSpec {backup_id,expected_registry_state:Pinned|ClosureCertified|Sealed|PublicationAuthorizedUndispatched,source_pin_ref:StrongRef<BackupPinRecord>,no_publication_proof_ref:StrongRef<BackupNoPublicationProof<Local>>,cleanup_plan_ref:StrongRef<BackupStagingCleanupPlan<Local>>,cleanup_completion_ref:StrongRef<BackupStagingCleanupCompletion<Local>>,current_root_no_other_backup_owner_proof_ref:StrongRef<BackupPinAbsenceProof>,stable_reason,terminal_audit_gate}` atomically installs compact `AbortedBeforePublication` and releases only the enumerated Local pin/staging owners. If any publication evidence or unresolved SentUnknown exists, this command is permanently illegal and recovery follows the normal publication/verification/release path.

W12 abort is two-phase. `GlobalBackupAbortBeginSpec {intent_record_ref,expected_registry_state:Intent|CollectingClosures|Sealed|PublicationAuthorizedUndispatched,no_publication_proof_ref:StrongRef<BackupNoPublicationProof<Meta>>,meta_cleanup_plan_ref,exact_sorted_shard_pin_and_closure_commitment,abort_nonce,terminal_audit_gate}` installs `AbortAuthorized` while retaining every pin; only after its role-valid publication may a later certificate attempt create `GlobalBackupAbortAuthorizationCertificate`. Each `ShardBackupAbortSpec {authorization_ref:CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<GlobalBackupAbortAuthorizationCertificate>,own_pin_ref,own_closure_or_staging_state,own_cleanup_plan_ref,own_cleanup_completion_ref,current_root_no_other_owner_proof_ref,expected_abort_nonce}` removes only its own pin/staging closure and, after its own durable publication, permits creation of `ShardBackupAbortAck`. `GlobalBackupAbortFinalizeSpec {abort_begin_ref,authorization_certificate_ref,meta_cleanup_completion_ref,exact_sorted_shard_abort_ack_refs[CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<ShardBackupAbortAck>],complete_required_group_and_pin_bijection_proof_ref,expected_registry_state:AbortAuthorized,terminal_audit_gate}` alone selects compact `AbortedBeforePublication`. Missing/duplicate/wrong-shard acks remain blocking. All abort states live in payload/checkpoint/configuration/backup/restore/GC inventories, and crash tests cut proof, begin, every cleanup dispatch/receipt, shard apply/publication/ack, Meta finalize, and lost response.

`ShardBackupReleaseSpec` is the closed inner union `Authorize{authorization_ref:CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<GlobalBackupReleaseAuthorizationCertificate>,own_pin_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupPinRecord>,own_closure_certificate_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupClosureCertificate>,manifest_ref:BackupPublicationArtifactRef<BackupManifest>,publication_receipt_ref:StrongRef<BackupPublicationReceipt>,archive_retention_grant_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveRetentionGrant>,activated_source_release_hold_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveSourceReleaseHold>,fresh_grant_authority_observation_import_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveGrantAuthorityObservationImport<Shard>>,required_observation_action:ShardSourcePinRelease{own_shard_id},expected_registry_state:Certified,expected_barrier_topology_configuration_and_pin_generation}|Finalize{authorization_ref:CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<GlobalBackupReleaseAuthorizationCertificate>,own_pin_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupPinRecord>,own_closure_certificate_ref:StrongRef<ShardBackupClosureCertificate>,expected_registry_state:ReleaseAuthorized,current_root_no_other_pin_proof_ref:StrongRef<BackupPinAbsenceProof>,post_release_registry_body_recipe}`. `BackupPinAbsenceProof` binds the exact current role root, backup registry generation, backup ID/pin generation, complete scan commitment, and checker version; it cannot be a generic reachability assertion. `Authorize` verifies the current activated hold but keeps the pin and enters ReleaseAuthorized; `Finalize` alone removes it, installs shard Released, and permits a later certificate attempt to create the exact signed `ShardBackupReleaseAck` with authorization/hold/observation, post-release root/no-pin proof, applied index, and certificate-attempt closure.

`GlobalBackupReleaseFinalizeSpec` is `{authorization_record_ref:StrongRef<GlobalControlRecord>,authorization_certificate_ref:StrongRef<GlobalBackupReleaseAuthorizationCertificate>,exact_sorted_shard_release_ack_refs[CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<ShardBackupReleaseAck>],activated_source_release_hold_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveSourceReleaseHold>,fresh_grant_authority_observation_import_ref:StrongRef<ArchiveGrantAuthorityObservationImport<Meta>>,required_observation_action:GlobalSourceReleaseFinalize,expected_registry_state:Releasing,exact_required_shard_commitment,meta_post_release_body_recipe,terminal_audit_gate}`. It drops the Meta pin and enters `ReleasedPendingArchiveHoldCompletion` only after every and only configured shard ack under the still-current Activated hold, and constructs the portable sharded `ArchiveSourceReleaseEvidence`. `ArchiveSourceReleaseCompletionImportSpec<Meta>` alone enters final Released. Meta states are `Absent|Collecting|Sealed|PublicationAuthorizedUndispatched|PublicationReceiptedPendingTransparency|PublicationReceiptedPendingGrant|TransparencyAuthorizedUndispatched|TransparencyIncludedPendingGrant|GrantIssueAuthorizedUndispatched|Published|ArtifactVerified|HoldPrepareAuthorizedUndispatched|HoldPrepared|HoldActivateAuthorizedUndispatched|HoldActivated|Releasing|ReleasedPendingArchiveHoldCompletion|Released`; shard states are `Absent|Pinned|Certified|ReleaseAuthorized|Released`. Reconfiguration, GC, key destruction, topology retirement, checkpoints, and floors retain every nonterminal state and every operation/dispatch/grant-head/hold/completion observation import needed for recovery. Renewal/revocation/expiry is raced before reopen, verification, authorization, every hold transition, shard authorize/finalize, Meta finalize, archive completion CAS, and completion import; stale generations always fail closed.

`BackupState` in the sealed manifest is the closed nonretaining posture tag `Local{barrier_coordinates,source_state:BackupSourceIdentity<LogicalStateRoot>,archived_state_ref:BackupArchiveRef<LogicalStateRoot>,checkpoint_configuration_history_inventory_digests,local_closure_certificate_identity}|Sharded{barrier_global_prefix,source_global_state:BackupSourceIdentity<GlobalStateRoot>,archived_global_state_ref:BackupArchiveRef<GlobalStateRoot>,topology_and_configuration_digests,sorted_shards[{shard_id,source_state:BackupSourceIdentity<ShardLogicalStateRoot>,archived_state_ref:BackupArchiveRef<ShardLogicalStateRoot>,closure_certificate_identity,partition_commitment}],complete_group_and_partition_commitment}`. Legacy Local manifests remain Local after activation and are never reinterpreted as Sharded. Unknown/mixed posture, group, inventory, trust, barrier, or configuration fields fail closed.

Same-identity write authority comes from one external linearizable chain. `AcquisitionRefinementState` is `None|BootstrapOpenersCommitted{refinement_generation=1,phase_a_plan_digest,archive_receipt_digest,refinement_digest,availability_certificate_digest,bootstrap_action_set_digest}|VerifiedObjectInventoryCommitted{refinement_generation=2,phase_a_plan_digest,bootstrap_refinement_digest,verified_manifest_and_projection_digests,refinement_digest,availability_certificate_digest,exact_inventory_count_and_root,phase_b_action_set_digest}`. `PortablePriorLeaseClosureContinuationPackage` is the reference-free threshold-signed `{restore_id,continuity_domain_and_target_identity,planned_target_incarnation,frozen_issuer_configuration_bytes_and_set_digest,sorted_issuer_and_cohort_recipe_bytes,sorted_contract_operation_idempotency_action_body_and_original_source_gate_bytes,sorted_completed_status_terminal_receipt_and_portable_evidence_bytes,completed_terminal_evidence_accumulator,remaining_issuer_and_cohort_bitmap,required_historical_time_profile_verifier_and_registry_ancestry_bytes,continuation_availability_certificate,continuation_retention_floor,no_service_until_complete:true,package_digest,signer_set_epoch,threshold_signatures}`. Its availability certificate proves the complete bytes—not merely a digest—exist in the continuity authority's declared failure domains through the retention floor. `PriorIncarnationLeaseClosureDisposition` is the closed union `NotApplicableNewIdentity|Complete{barrier_digest,complete_issuer_and_cohort_bijection_commitment,no_future_prior_incarnation_issue_or_renew:true}|PendingInheritedFromFence{continuation_package_bytes_and_digest:PortablePriorLeaseClosureContinuationPackage,no_service_while_pending:true}`. `RestoreAbandonmentAuthoritySeed` is the single pre-order reference-free `{restore_id,target_database_and_security_identity,target_incarnation,service_visibility_epoch,authority_profile,continuity_predecessor_class,source_lease_identity,source_access_cleanup_policy_id,stable_no_endpoint_reason,permanent_no_service_no_same_incarnation_successor_and_higher_incarnation_only_rules,seed_digest}`. It contains no journal/spec/operation record, action/cleanup recipe, request, manifest, skeleton, external result, tombstone body, publication evidence, or receipt. Both planes may bind the same seed only when every stable field matches; plane-specific authority is supplied outside it. `ClusterIncarnationContinuityRecord` is `{continuity_domain_id,database_id,database_security_namespace_id,predecessor_digest,cas_version,retired_incarnation_floor,active_or_reserved_incarnation,state:Operational{posture:Local|Sharded,writer_authority_digest,service_visibility_epoch,lease_policy:DirectOrdinary|PromotionReceiptRequired{promotion_manifest_digest,catalog_activation_receipt_digest,promotion_operation_id,complete_pre-finalization_lineage_commitment}}|RestoreFencePending{restore_id,source_backup_manifest_digest,planned_target_incarnation,lease_issuer_and_cohort_inventory_commitment,prior_lease_fence_operation_set_commitment,retiring_time_authority_profile_set_commitment,issuer_configuration_set_frozen:true,new_issuer_registration_forbidden:true,continuity_authority_direct_prior_incarnation_issuance_fenced:true,issuer_closure_status:Pending{complete_issuer_recipe_set_commitment,completed_terminal_evidence_accumulator,remaining_issuer_and_cohort_bitmap},acquisition_plan_and_operation_commitment}|RestoreReserved{restore_id,source_backup_manifest_digest,source_backup_incarnation,retired_through_incarnation,target_incarnation,recovery_writer_authority_digest,service_visibility_epoch,prior_lease_closure:Complete{prior_lease_barrier_digest,complete_issuer_and_cohort_bijection_commitment,no_future_prior_incarnation_issue_or_renew:true},source_acquisition_plan_and_operation_commitment,acquisition_refinement_state:AcquisitionRefinementState,lease_policy:RecoveryOnly}|CloneReserved{restore_id,source_database_and_security_identity,source_backup_manifest_digest,target_incarnation,recovery_writer_authority_digest,service_visibility_epoch,lease_policy:RecoveryOnly,new_identity_allocation_receipt_digest,source_acquisition_plan_and_operation_commitment,acquisition_refinement_state:AcquisitionRefinementState}|RoleTransitionReserved{migration_nonce,transition_certificate_digest,source_posture:Local,target_posture:Sharded,source_service_visibility_epoch,target_service_visibility_epoch,service_epoch_reservation_id,source_local_group_and_terminal_seal_commitment,target_group_topology_and_endpoint_commitment,transition_writer_authority_digest,lease_policy:RoleTransitionOnly}|PromotionCatalogPending{operation_kind:Restore|RoleTransition,operation_id,manifest_digest,catalog_reservation_id,catalog_reservation_digest_and_version,target_posture,target_incarnation,service_visibility_epoch,promotion_writer_authority_digest,lease_policy:PromotionOnly,no_ordinary_lease:true}|RestoreAbandoned{restore_id,target_incarnation,service_visibility_epoch,abandonment_basis:PreBootstrapNoRoot{abandonment_authority_seed_digest,prior_lease_closure_disposition:PriorIncarnationLeaseClosureDisposition}|CanonicalRooted{abandonment_authority_seed_digest,target_tombstone_skeleton_digest,prior_lease_closure_disposition:PriorIncarnationLeaseClosureDisposition},retired_through_incarnation,no_operational_successor_at_this_incarnation:true}|RoleTransitionAbandonedSealed{migration_nonce,target_service_visibility_epoch,catalog_tombstone_digest,terminal_local_seal_commitment,abandonment_receipt_digest,no_unfreeze_or_operational_successor:true},issued_at,signer_set_epoch,threshold_signatures}`. `RestoreFencePending` freezes the issuer universe and prevents the continuity authority from issuing directly, but it intentionally does **not** claim that independent online/offline issuers have all closed; only a complete signed barrier and `RestoreReserved` may make that global claim. `CommitAcquisitionRefinement` may only advance None -> BootstrapOpenersCommitted -> VerifiedObjectInventoryCommitted for the same restore/target/authority/recipient/profile under the deterministic rule precommitted by Phase A; every successor commits a phase-specific loss-tolerant availability certificate. It cannot widen or replace any other field. Only the returned direct-successor head authorizes introduced actions.

`RestoreAbandonableContinuityPredecessor` is the exact reference-free union `RestoreFencePending{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,planned_target_incarnation,frozen_issuer_set_and_pending_closure_projection}|RestoreReservedNone{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,acquisition_refinement_state:None,complete_prior_lease_closure_projection}|RestoreReservedBootstrapOpeners{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,acquisition_refinement_state:BootstrapOpenersCommitted,complete_prior_lease_closure_projection}|RestoreReservedVerifiedObjectInventory{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,acquisition_refinement_state:VerifiedObjectInventoryCommitted,complete_prior_lease_closure_projection}|CloneReservedNone{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,acquisition_refinement_state:None}|CloneReservedBootstrapOpeners{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,acquisition_refinement_state:BootstrapOpenersCommitted}|CloneReservedVerifiedObjectInventory{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,acquisition_refinement_state:VerifiedObjectInventoryCommitted}|PromotionCatalogPendingRestore{head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,manifest_catalog_and_promotion_lineage_commitment}`. Every arm carries the same restore ID, target identity/incarnation, service epoch, acquisition plan, and recovery authority fixed by the abandonment action body.

`PreBootstrapRestoreContinuityCleanupDisposition` is the exact union `NoMutationOperationalUnchanged{mode:RecoverSameIdentity,current_operational_head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,planned_target_incarnation,enter_restore_fence_pending_contract_and_operation_commitment,terminal_attempt:NeverArmed|AbandonedBeforeSend|ConflictNoEffect|PermanentRefusal,typed_prebootstrap_never_sent_or_zero_effect_evidence,proof_current_operational_head_is_unchanged_and_no_restore_descendant_exists,plan_and_operation_nonreuse_floor}|NoMutationAuthenticatedAbsentClone{mode:CloneNewIdentity,authenticated_empty_continuity_map_proof,target_identity_nonreuse_floor,enter_clone_reserved_contract_and_operation_commitment,terminal_attempt:NeverArmed|AbandonedBeforeSend|ConflictNoEffect|PermanentRefusal,typed_prebootstrap_never_sent_or_zero_effect_evidence,new_identity_and_allocation_reservation_burn_commitments,proof_no_clone_or_restore_descendant_exists}|AbandonedByCas{predecessor:RestoreAbandonableContinuityPredecessor,abandonment_authority_seed_digest,contract_id:PreBootstrapRestoreContinuityAbandonContract,terminal_import_artifact_ref:PreBootstrapArtifactRef<PreBootstrapExternalTerminalImportArtifact<PreBootstrapRestoreContinuityAbandonContract>>,portable_terminal_evidence_artifact_ref:PreBootstrapArtifactRef<PortableExternalActionTerminalEvidence<PreBootstrapRestoreContinuityAbandonContract>>,operation_id,action_body_digest,result_restore_abandoned_head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,prior_lease_closure_disposition}`. `CanonicalRestoreContinuityCleanupDisposition<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` has the sole exact arm `AbandonedByCas{predecessor:RestoreAbandonableContinuityPredecessor,abandonment_authority_seed_digest,contract_id:CanonicalRestoreContinuityAbandonContract<Role>,terminal_import_ref:StrongRef<ExternalTerminalImportRecord<CanonicalRestoreContinuityAbandonContract<Role>,Role>>,portable_terminal_evidence_ref:StrongRef<PortableExternalActionTerminalEvidence<CanonicalRestoreContinuityAbandonContract<Role>>>,operation_id,action_body_digest,result_restore_abandoned_head_bytes_digest_and_cas_version,prior_lease_closure_disposition}`. The two no-mutation arms are prebootstrap terminal evidence, not fake continuity heads: same-identity cleanup leaves the pre-existing Operational incarnation and its older catalog endpoint untouched, while absent-clone cleanup relies on authenticated absence plus permanent allocation/nonreuse dispositions. The action kind `RestoreContinuityAbandon` has two statically distinct universal-dispatch rows: `PreBootstrapRestoreContinuityAbandonContract` uses `PreBootstrapAbandonmentCleanupGate`, while `CanonicalRestoreContinuityAbandonContract<Role>` uses the audit-visible canonical abandonment-operation candidate and ordinary Protocol publication evidence. Each requires the same-plane profile-valid catalog cleanup disposition and CASes only an actual `RestoreAbandonableContinuityPredecessor` to `RestoreAbandoned`; their attempts, request bindings, evidence, and imports cannot cross-decode. A `RestoreFencePending` predecessor transfers the complete `PortablePriorLeaseClosureContinuationPackage` into `PendingInheritedFromFence`; all other restore predecessors carry `Complete` or `NotApplicableNewIdentity` as appropriate. Already-applied is terminal only when the authority returns an authenticated existing equivalent `RestoreAbandoned` head for the same operation, seed, incarnation, plane, and closure disposition.

Same-identity recovery CASes `Operational{posture}(I_current) -> RestoreFencePending`, durably fences every online/offline prior-incarnation lease issuer, proves the complete cohort inventory expired or revoked, then CASes `RestoreReserved(J)` with `J > max(I_current,I_backup,retired_incarnation_floor)` and the exact barrier/acquisition-plan commitments. Clone recovery CAS-creates exactly one previously absent target database/security namespace into `CloneReserved(J)` under a nonreusable identity-allocation receipt whose claimed intended-use commitment already fixes the acquisition operation; it never traverses the source continuity chain as target authority. Promotion never jumps directly to Operational. It first acquires a nonexpiring hidden catalog reservation, then CASes `RestoreReserved|CloneReserved|RoleTransitionReserved -> PromotionCatalogPending`, activates the exact reserved catalog row, and only then CASes to `Operational{lease_policy=PromotionReceiptRequired}` using the composite four-lineage receipt. The catalog row remains admission-hidden until that final receipt exists. An irreconcilable no-endpoint conflict before finalization uses rooted catalog-tombstone and continuity-abandon operations; restore must choose a higher incarnation, while a role-transition source remains terminally sealed and can proceed only through fenced restore/clone. DirectOrdinary is reserved for fresh/direct service activation whose catalog and continuity publication are one externally atomic authority operation. Abandonment changes exactly the registered `RestoreAbandonableContinuityPredecessor` to `RestoreAbandoned`, advances the retired floor through the abandoned incarnation, and permanently forbids an Operational successor at that incarnation. A later same-identity recovery must move `RestoreAbandoned{retired through J} -> RestoreFencePending{target K}` for a new restore ID with `K > J` and a fresh recovery authority, inherit and finish any pending issuer closure, and only then enter `RestoreReserved` with one exact complete prior-lease barrier; no state at J is resurrected and no direct Abandoned -> Reserved shortcut exists. No other source or target posture is registered in v1. Checked overflow fails. Only one direct successor can win for a target identity, no acquisition send or recovery/transition write precedes its exact claimed plan, and continuity, lease/time guards, service-catalog reservation/activation, promotion receipts, and open/session admission all byte-match the active state/posture/incarnation/service epoch.

**Rollback-protected authority time.** Canonical logical HLC orders database state; it is never an expiry clock. Process-local monotonic time may enforce a short-lived in-memory use budget and drive advisory timers; ambient wall time is display-only. Any authorization, lease-validity, expiry, release, retirement, key destruction, archive downgrade, restore fencing, or retention-cut decision uses the following rollback-protected authority-time contract or fails closed.

`AuthorityInstant` is `{time_domain_id,authority_epoch,tick:u128}` and compares only within one domain/epoch; windows are closed-open: `not_before <= true_authority_time < expires_at`. `AuthorityInterval` is the exact `{earliest:AuthorityInstant,latest:AuthorityInstant}` with byte-identical domain/epoch fields and `earliest.tick <= latest.tick`; intervals from different domains/epochs are never ordered, intersected, or bridged by scalar conversion. `TimeAuthorityProfile` is the immutable threshold-signed `{schema_version,time_domain_id,authority_epoch,tick_scale,external_registry_id,ordered_signers[{signer_id,key_id,verification_key}],threshold,maximum_source_uncertainty_ticks,maximum_challenge_round_trip_ticks,maximum_guard_use_ticks,comparison_semantics:ClosedOpen,unavailable_policy:FailClosed,predecessor_profile_digest:WeakDigest?,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`.

External time evidence is reference-free. `PortableTimeAuthorityObservation` is the fresh challenged signed `{profile_oid,profile_digest,time_domain_id,authority_epoch,challenge_nonce,subject_digest,intended_use_digest,authority_sequence,possible_time_interval:AuthorityInterval,external_registry_head_digest,external_registry_cas_version,signer_set_epoch,threshold_signatures}`. It never claims process-local send/receive counters.

`ShardTimeAuthorityProjection` is the shard-local certified Meta projection `{source_meta_prefix,source_meta_configuration_identity,source_meta_time_registry_generation,selected_profile_oid,sorted_profile_projections[{profile_oid,profile_digest,issuance_state:ActiveForIssuance|ClosingRequested|IssuanceClosing|IssuanceQuiescent|Draining|Retired,verification_live_through_commitment}],time_authority_registry_head_digest,verifier_and_offline_issuer_floor_commitment,retention_grant_and_payload_availability_evidence,typed_projection_payload_identity_and_digest,projection_certificate_ref:CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<MetaControlProjectionCertificate>,body_digest}`. Its certificate's `TypedCertifiedMetaProjectionPayload` arm is exactly `TimeAuthorityRegistryProjection` and byte-matches the payload identity/digest and source prefix/effect. It is installed only through the exact contiguous ActiveMetaProjectionRoot time-authority slot and is invalid after that source prefix/configuration/trust or retention evidence ceases to be current.

`LocalChallengeRoundTripWitness` is the nonportable `{process_incarnation_id,challenge_nonce,send_monotonic_tick,receive_monotonic_tick,checked_elapsed_ticks,monotonic_source_profile_id,conversion_to_authority_uncertainty_ticks,body_digest}`. `TimeAuthorityObservationImport` is the closed role-local union `Local{role_and_group,current_configuration_writer_fence_and_publication_commitment,profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,portable_observation_ref:StrongRef<PortableTimeAuthorityObservation>,current_registry_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRegistry<Local>>,local_round_trip_witness:LocalChallengeRoundTripWitness,exact_profile_registry_and_transcript_match_digest,imported_at_maintenance_identity}|Meta{role_and_group,current_configuration_writer_fence_and_publication_commitment,profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,portable_observation_ref:StrongRef<PortableTimeAuthorityObservation>,current_registry_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRegistry<Meta>>,local_round_trip_witness:LocalChallengeRoundTripWitness,exact_profile_registry_and_transcript_match_digest,imported_at_maintenance_identity}|Shard{role_and_group,current_configuration_writer_fence_and_publication_commitment,profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,portable_observation_ref:StrongRef<PortableTimeAuthorityObservation>,current_meta_time_authority_projection_ref:StrongRef<ShardTimeAuthorityProjection>,local_round_trip_witness:LocalChallengeRoundTripWitness,exact_profile_projection_and_transcript_match_digest,imported_at_maintenance_identity}`. The import verifies the portable profile identity/digest, current registry or certified projection, role/group/configuration/fence, same-nonce local round trip, interval, subject, intended use, and signatures before any local validator may consume it. Challenge nonce, subject, and use are signed. Replay, wrong profile/domain/epoch, noncurrent registry head, excessive checked round trip/uncertainty, process-incarnation mismatch, role substitution, or signature failure is unusable.

`time_bound_subjects.toml` is the single exhaustive source for the closed `TimeBoundSubject` union. Each row names one concrete durable schema or one exact capability variant, its canonical pre-evidence transcript recipe, profile/window field tags, legal intended uses, evidence owner, expiry/retirement transition, and retention floor. It forbids raw refs, a generic object arm, a generic capability arm, and overlapping transcripts. `TimeValidationEvidence` is the already-built role-local immutable `{profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,observation_import_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityObservationImport>,subject:TimeBoundSubject,intended_use_digest,classification:Usable{not_before,expires_at,validated_process_incarnation_id,guard_deadline_local_monotonic_tick}|NotYetValid{not_before}|Expired{expires_at},validator_version,validation_digest}`. `Usable` exists only when the imported portable observation's `possible_time_interval.earliest >= not_before`, the local round-trip witness belongs to the current process incarnation, and `checked_add(possible_time_interval.latest.tick,maximum_guard_use_ticks)` succeeds in the same domain/epoch and is `< expires_at`; its local guard deadline is derived with checked arithmetic from the same receive tick and conservative remaining budget. A linear use guard can be constructed only in that same process incarnation while its current monotonic tick is strictly before the recorded deadline. Durable Usable bytes surviving restart therefore authorize nothing until a fresh observation/import/evidence exists. `NotYetValid` exists only when `possible_time_interval.latest < not_before`; `Expired` only when `possible_time_interval.earliest >= expires_at` and remains durable across restart. An interval overlapping either boundary yields no evidence and the uniform retryable `TimeAuthorityUnavailable`, before any protected lookup or disclosure. Tick addition, bound normalization, challenge-round-trip subtraction, and profile drain arithmetic are checked; overflow, saturation requirement, or domain/epoch mismatch yields `TimeAuthorityUnavailable` and never wraps.

The v1 arms bind the canonical pre-evidence body, never a future object that embeds the evidence, and are exactly: `TxnOutcomeCapabilityBytes`, `ResumeSubscriptionCapabilityBytes`, `ResumeBufferedResultCapabilityBytes`, `ResumeArtifactOutputCapabilityBytes`, `MergeOutcomeCapabilityBytes`, `ReadYourWritesCapabilityBytes`, `MacaroonTokenBytes`, `OfflineMacaroonIssuerEpochCohort`, `MutationPermitRecord`, `ReadPermitRecord`, `AuthorizationLease`, `TxnOwnershipLease`, `PrivacyExecutionLease`, `ResultDeliveryLeaseTimeBasis`, `SubscriptionDeliveryLeaseTimeBasis`, `ArtifactOutputLeaseTimeBasis`, `ProtectedErrorLeaseTimeBasis`, `ProtectedErrorReplayTimeBasis`, `TxnOutcomeLookupWindow`, `FollowerLeaseRead`, `IdRangeLease`, `ShardIdRangeLease`, `ClusterIncarnationLease`, `PriorIncarnationLeaseCohortWindow`, `RestoreSourceLeaseRecordLocal`, `RestoreSourceLeaseRecordMeta`, `ShardRestoreSourceLeaseProjection`, `NewDatabaseIdentityReservation`, `ServiceVisibilityEpochReservation`, `AllocationEpochReservation`, `ProfiledResourceReservationDeadline`, `ReplayArchiveRecord`, `ArchiveRetentionGrantWindow`, `ArchiveSourceReleasePreparedHoldWindow`, `KeyEnvelopeGrantWindow`, `BackupPublicationFreshness`, `BackupTransparencyFreshness`, `TransparencyCheckpointFreshnessBasis`, `CrossLogTransparencyFreshness`, `PayloadReceiptProposalFreshnessBasis`, `VerifierKeyWindow`, and `IrreversibleDispatchObservationWindow`. The three restore-source arms map exactly to `RestoreSourceLeaseRecord<Local>`, `RestoreSourceLeaseRecord<Meta>`, and the Shard projection schema; the prebootstrap owner belongs only to `prebootstrap_artifact_kinds.toml` and its prebootstrap time validator. Each row explicitly maps the arm to its exact schema and window field tags; aliases such as `FollowerReadLease`, `IdRangeIssuanceLease`, `RestoreSourceLease`, or `ReplayArchiveLease` are unregistered. Capability arms contain the exact capability kind plus header-and-body digest; they cannot overlap. `MacaroonTokenBytes` validates one presented root or attenuated token and therefore contains its exact token kind plus canonical header/body/caveat-chain digest. Output-basis arms contain role, owner/delivery generation, complete authority commitment, policy, and exact window.

The formerly shorthand window names above are generated exact schemas, not aliases for two loose timestamps. Their common canonical prefix is `{subject_kind,time_authority_profile_oid,not_before:AuthorityInstant,expires_at:AuthorityInstant,subject_body_digest,intended_use_set,owner_plane_and_slot,body_digest}`, with both instants byte-matching the profile domain/epoch and `not_before < expires_at`. Their subject-specific closed suffixes are: `ProtectedErrorReplayTimeBasis<Role>{authority_bound_header:AuthorityBoundHeader<Role>,error_delivery_id,error_generation,protected_error_policy_ref,replay_count_and_ceiling,public_error_digest}`; `TxnOutcomeLookupWindow<Role>{authority_bound_header,capability_commitment,outcome_index_key_commitment,lookup_floor_generation,verifier_key_ref}`; `ProfiledResourceReservationDeadline<Role>{authority_bound_header,reservation_kind,reservation_id,reservation_generation,resource_ledger_basis_digest,expiry_disposition}`; `PriorIncarnationLeaseCohortWindow{cohort_recipe_id,continuity_domain_id,database_security_namespace_id,prior_incarnation,issuer_id,issuer_configuration_identity_and_digest,issuer_authority_epoch,covered_generation_and_counter_ranges,issuer_fence_receipt_digest,cohort_closure_row_bytes_and_digest,time_domain_id,time_authority_epoch,last_legal_issuance_or_renewal_counter,maximum_issued_or_renewed_expires_at:AuthorityInstant,issuance_ledger_accumulator_and_range_completeness_commitment,window_digest}`; `ArchiveRetentionGrantWindow{archive_authority_id,grant_id,grant_generation,grant_subject_set_digest,grant_head_digest_and_cas_version}`; `ArchiveSourceReleasePreparedHoldWindow{archive_authority_id,hold_id,release_generation,participant_set_digest,prepared_head_digest_and_cas_version}`; `KeyEnvelopeGrantWindow<Role>{authority_bound_header,grant_id,generation,recipient_id,graph,branch,envelope_epoch,coverage_cut,grant_record_digest}`; `BackupPublicationFreshness{backup_id,publication_operation_id,publication_bundle_id,publication_authority_head_digest_and_cas_version,receipt_request_binding_digest}`; `BackupTransparencyFreshness{backup_id,transparency_operation_id,required_policy_digest,checkpoint_identity_and_digest,inclusion_subject_digest}`; `TransparencyCheckpointFreshnessBasis{log_id,security_domain_id,witness_policy_oid,checkpoint_body_digest,log_size,claim_class}`; `CrossLogTransparencyFreshness{source_checkpoint_digest,target_log_id,target_policy_oid,target_log_size,target_checkpoint_digest,cross_log_receipt_digest}`; `PayloadReceiptProposalFreshnessBasis{role_and_group,configuration_identity,payload_predicate_digest,storage_member,prepared_ownership_id,base_closure_inventory_digest,receipt_body_without_freshness_or_signature_digest}`; `VerifierKeyWindow{verifier_kind,key_id,key_epoch,verification_scope_digest,retention_floor_digest}`; and `IrreversibleDispatchObservationWindow<Role>{authority_binding_public_commitment,dispatch_contract_id,operation_id,attempt_generation,target_identity,source_gate_commitment,status_or_send_action_digest}`. The cohort window's common `expires_at` must byte-equal the exhaustive signed `maximum_issued_or_renewed_expires_at`; no lifetime, nominal duration, counter arithmetic, or derived expiry field exists. Generation rejects a suffix without its exact prefix, a prefix reused for another subject, an embedded future evidence ref, or a named window whose owner/expiry transition is absent.

`MacaroonRootIssuanceReceipt` is the portable signed `{issuer_id,mac_key_id,mac_key_epoch,root_token_id,root_issuance_sequence,canonical_issuance_request_digest,idempotency_key_digest,root_token_body_digest,canonical_root_token_digest,time_authority_profile_oid,root_not_before,root_expires_at,issuer_counter,authority_registry_head_digest_and_cas_version,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. `MacaroonRootIssuanceRecord<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is the local durable root-issuance owner `{authority_bound_header:AuthorityBoundHeader<Role>,root_token_id,issuance_receipt_ref:StrongRef<MacaroonRootIssuanceReceipt>,canonical_issuance_request_digest,idempotency_key_digest,root_token_body_digest,canonical_root_token_digest,canonical_root_token_bytes_ref:StrongRef<CanonicalCapabilityBytes>,replay_retention_floor,issuer_id,mac_key_id,mac_key_epoch,root_issuance_sequence,time_authority_profile_oid,root_not_before,root_expires_at,maximum_attenuation_expiry_equal_to_root_expiry,revocation_subject_commitment,state:Live|Revoked{revocation_evidence_ref}|Expired{time_validation_evidence_ref},body_digest}`. Online issuance creates exactly one record and publishes the matching reservation successor in the same RootManifest generation before returning canonical bytes; exact retry joins and returns the retained identical bytes. The root token ID, request/idempotency commitment, receipt sequence, and byte digest are permanent through the replay floor, while attenuated presentations are derived byte variants and never create inventory rows.

`OfflineMacaroonIssuerEpochFenceReceipt` is the portable signed result of moving one non-exportable counter-backed issuer epoch to verify-only/disabled-for-root-issuance: `{issuer_id,mac_key_id,mac_key_epoch,issuer_epoch_configuration_digest,permitted_root_sequence_range,permitted_hardware_counter_range,last_legal_root_issuance_sequence,returned_issuer_counter,issuer_epoch_state:VerifyOnly|Disabled,authority_registry_head_digest_and_cas_version,fenced_at:AuthorityInstant,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. `OfflineMacaroonIssuerEpochCohort` is the signed bounded inventory subject `{issuer_id,mac_key_id,mac_key_epoch,issuer_epoch_configuration_digest,time_authority_profile_oid,cohort_not_before,permitted_root_sequence_range,permitted_hardware_counter_range,maximum_root_lifetime_ticks,derived_maximum_possible_expiry,last_legal_root_issuance_sequence,returned_issuer_counter,issuer_epoch_fence_receipt_digest,range_and_maximum_expiry_derivation_proof,issuance_scope_ceiling_commitment,attenuation_semantics_oid,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. Its checker derives the maximum possible expiry from the configured maximum root lifetime, last permitted counter/sequence, and challenged fence interval; an asserted maximum without that derivation is invalid. It represents every root token that could have been issued by that epoch even when individual bytes are not locally enumerable; it does not validate a presented token. The offline issuer MAC/verify-only service and verification material remain rooted through the derived cohort maximum expiry. Post-fence attenuation of a pre-fence root is legal only under the exact narrowing law and does not create a new cohort member; post-fence root minting is rejected by the hardware counter/fence and by verification. `MacaroonTokenBytes` remains a use-time `TimeBoundSubject` so an individual presented token can be classified, but the rotation inventory tracks online `MacaroonRootIssuanceRecord` rows and offline issuer cohorts—not every possible attenuated byte string.

Each unsigned-body transcript includes its `time_authority_profile_oid`, both bounds when the object has a window, and every authority/domain/generation field, excluding only signatures/MAC and the later `TimeValidationEvidence` reference. Generation performs a two-way total check: every active `durable_fields.toml` time-bearing field set has exactly one nonoverlapping subject row, and every subject row resolves to one live schema/variant, owner floor, and transition. A status-only check may consume a runtime guard; an ordered expiry, release, tombstone, retirement, compaction, or reclamation must retain the exact durable evidence in its applied transition.

A successful Usable validation creates a linear, nonserializable `TimeUseGuard` bound to observation, subject, intended action, process incarnation, and remaining monotonic use budget. It is consumed immediately before the protected observation/irreversible step and cannot survive restart, over-budget suspend, clone, serialization, or replay. Local monotonic time measures only challenge/use age; it never establishes absolute time. Expired evidence is durable and monotone for its one bound canonical release/expiry action. Every canonical transition whose legality depends on expiry strongly retains the exact evidence; a scalar deadline or timeout alone never changes canonical state or cuts retention.

`TimeAuthorityRegistry<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is `{role,generation,profiles[profile_oid -> ActiveForIssuance{profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,issuance_generation}|ClosingRequested{profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,rotation_intent_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRotationIntentRecord<Role>>,freeze_generation,reservation_index_ref:StrongRef<TimeSubjectIssuanceReservationIndex<Role>>}|IssuanceClosing{profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,rotation_intent_ref,closing_receipt_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityIssuanceClosingReceipt>,local_close_cut}|IssuanceQuiescent{profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,rotation_intent_ref,closing_receipt_ref,own_reservation_closure_ref:StrongRef<RoleTimeIssuanceReservationClosure<Role>>}|Draining{profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,transition_record_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityEpochTransitionRecord<Role>>,issuance_fence_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityIssuanceFence>,subject_inventory_closure_ref:StrongRef<RoleTimeBoundSubjectInventoryClosure<Role>>,drain_hold_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityDrainHold<Role>>,maximum_old_subject_expiry}|Retired{profile_identity_and_digest,terminal_summary_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityTransitionTerminalSummary<Role>>,retired_at_registry_generation}],selected_profile_oid,profile_retirement_floor,body_digest:BodyDigest<TimeAuthorityRegistry<Role>>}`. Profile keys are unique and canonical. In steady state exactly one selected profile is `ActiveForIssuance`; from ordered intent through quiescence there are zero Active profiles and exactly one selected `ClosingRequested`, `IssuanceClosing`, or `IssuanceQuiescent` profile. After activation exactly one successor is Active and the predecessor is Draining. No issuance encoder accepts ClosingRequested, IssuanceClosing, IssuanceQuiescent, Draining, or Retired. The registered body transcript excludes only `body_digest`. Every profile needed by a live window remains rooted, but Retired never retains the transition record, original administrator authorization, live authority binding, old subject objects, drain hold, or detailed dispatch attempts. `TimeValidationEvidence` resolves its profile through the current role registry or, on a Shard, the exact current certified Meta projection: ActiveForIssuance and Draining are valid for verification/use; ClosingRequested/IssuanceClosing/IssuanceQuiescent are valid only for a subject whose immutable reservation predates the freeze; Retired/foreign/unrooted profiles are invalid; and no non-Active state can authorize a new issuance reservation.

Closing issuance is an ordered, externally recoverable protocol, not a read-only guard. Each participating group first orders `TimeIssuanceAdmissionFreezeSpec {transition_id,retiring_profile_oid,expected_active_projection,freeze_generation,expected_reservation_index_ref,terminal_audit_gate:LifecycleScaffoldingNotRequired}`. Its applied record blocks new reservations locally and exports `GroupTimeIssuanceAdmissionFreezeCertificate {SameGroupCertificateHeader,transition_id,role_and_group,retiring_profile_oid,freeze_generation,last_admitted_local_sequence,reservation_index_digest,post_freeze_all_plane_root_and_slot_commitment,one_digest_signer_lock_ref,quorum_signatures}`. Local consumes its own certificate; Meta consumes its own plus one exact certificate from every current or prospective configured shard. `TimeAuthorityRotationIntentSpec<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is then the ordered Semantic authorization `{authority_bound_header:AuthorityBoundHeader<Role>,admin_authorization_decision_ref:StrongRef<AuthorizationDecisionRecord<Role>>,transition_id,expected_registry_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRegistry<Role>>,expected_registry_generation,expected_profile_state:ActiveForIssuance,retiring_profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,successor_profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,exact_current_and_prospective_group_freeze_certificate_set,exact_configured_offline_issuer_epoch_set,external_close_operation_recipe,external_fence_operation_recipe,external_registry_transition_operation_recipe,closure_resource_reservations,abort_before_external_fence_recipe,terminal_audit_gate}`. Apply atomically selects `ClosingRequested` and creates immutable `TimeAuthorityRotationIntentRecord<Role>` owning those exact sets, operation IDs/idempotency keys/transcripts, resource holds, authorization, and audit lineage. Only its durable `PortableSemanticVisibilityCertificate<Role>` may initialize the universal external-effect dispatch for the close operation.

The external close request byte-matches the intent and all group floors. Status-first recovery returns portable `TimeAuthorityIssuanceClosingReceipt {external_request_binding:ExternalActionRequestBinding{action_kind=TimeAuthorityIssuanceClose},transition_id,retiring_profile_oid,closing_head_digest_and_cas_version,sorted_group_closing_floors[{role_and_group,issuance_epoch,last_admitted_local_sequence,reservation_inventory_digest,quiescence_certificate_digest:None}],configured_group_set_commitment,configured_offline_issuer_epoch_set_commitment,closed_at:AuthorityInstant,signer_set_epoch,threshold_signatures}` and atomically rejects any old-profile reservation beyond those group-local floors. Protocol receipt import produces portable terminal evidence; it never mutates Semantic state directly. `TimeAuthorityIssuanceCloseSpec<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` consumes the intent, receipt, dispatch terminal evidence, exact group-freeze set, and current registry and changes only `ClosingRequested -> IssuanceClosing`. A shard consumes the certified Meta close projection through `ShardTimeAuthorityIssuanceCloseApplySpec` and changes only its active projection/freeze state. Before the external close is known sent, a typed abort may select `ClosingRequested -> ActiveForIssuance` and release every unchanged group freeze and resource hold. Once the close dispatch is `SentUnknown` or receipted, reopen is illegal.

`TimeAuthorityTransitionCompletionAuthority<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is the non-widenable structural `{role_and_group,transition_id,rotation_intent_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRotationIntentRecord<Role>>,original_admin_authorization_decision_ref:StrongRef<AuthorizationDecisionRecord<Role>>,original_authority_bound_header:AuthorityBoundHeader<Role>,retiring_and_successor_profile_commitment,configured_group_offline_issuer_and_resource_commitment,close_fence_and_registry_operation_commitment,irreversibility_basis:CloseSentUnknown{attempt_ref:StrongRef<IrreversibleDispatchAttempt<TimeAuthorityIssuanceClose>>,canonical_full_request_digest}|ClosingReceipted{terminal_evidence_ref:StrongRef<PortableTimeAuthorityIssuanceCloseTerminalEvidence>}|FinalFenceSentUnknown{attempt_ref:StrongRef<IrreversibleDispatchAttempt<TimeAuthorityIssuanceFence>>,canonical_full_request_digest}|FinalFenceReceipted{terminal_evidence_ref:StrongRef<PortableTimeAuthorityIssuanceFenceTerminalEvidence>}|RegistryTransitionSentUnknown{attempt_ref:StrongRef<IrreversibleDispatchAttempt<TimeAuthorityRegistryTransition>>,canonical_full_request_digest}|RegistryTransitionReceipted{terminal_evidence_ref:StrongRef<PortableTimeAuthorityRegistryTransitionTerminalEvidence>},allowed_successor_spec_tags[TimeAuthorityIssuanceCloseSpec|TimeAuthorityIssuanceFenceAuthorizeSpec|TimeAuthorityRegistryTransitionAuthorizeSpec|TimeAuthorityProfileTransitionSpec],body_digest}`. It is constructible only from the rooted intent plus the exact current universal-dispatch attempt or terminal evidence at or beyond the listed irreversible state; a bare stage enum is insufficient. It cannot alter the successor, issuer/group sets, resources, operation IDs, request bodies, authority ceiling, or audit lineage, and cannot authorize abort, retirement, fresh issuance, or a new client choice.

`TimeAuthorityRetirementCleanupAuthority<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is the distinct structural `{role_and_group,transition_record_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityEpochTransitionRecord<Role>>,expected_registry_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRegistry<Role>>,required_retiring_state:Draining,complete_subject_inventory_and_disposition_commitment,shutdown_and_verifier_floor_commitment,configuration_and_shard_retirement_floor_commitment,allowed_successor_spec_tag:TimeAuthorityProfileRetirementSpec,body_digest}`. It is constructible only after activation, from the exact Draining state and complete cleanup closure; it authorizes only deterministic retirement of that one predecessor profile and cannot change either profile, reissue a subject, or widen authority.

Every issuance already admitted owns a predecessor-linked immutable `TimeSubjectIssuanceReservation<Role> {authority_binding:AuthorityBindingFor<Role>,stable_reservation_key:{profile_oid,role_and_group,issuance_epoch,issuance_sequence,idempotency_key_digest},generation,predecessor_ref:StrongRef<TimeSubjectIssuanceReservation<Role>>?,transition_or_operation_id,subject_arm,canonical_pre_evidence_subject_digest,state:Reserved|Published{subject_identity,publication_cut,subject_membership_proof_ref}|Burned{typed_no_publication_proof_ref},body_digest}` indexed by `TimeSubjectIssuanceReservationIndex<Role>`. Reserved is generation one. Its sole terminal successor is generation two: Published is installed in the same RootManifest/RootSlot publication that installs the issued subject owner, while Burned requires a typed proof that no such owner/publication exists. Recovery may turn a lingering Reserved into Published only by proving exact current-root subject membership, otherwise into Burned only by proving nonpublication. A nonserializable `TimeIssuanceGuard` can be constructed only from one current Reserved row and is consumed by the matching Published/Burned successor; it cannot be acquired from an observation alone.

Each group resolves every reservation through its signed floor and emits `GroupTimeIssuanceQuiescenceCertificate {SameGroupCertificateHeader,transition_id,role_and_group,retiring_profile_oid,issuance_epoch,last_admitted_local_sequence,closing_receipt_digest,reservation_inventory_digest,complete_reserved_to_published_or_burned_bijection_commitment,zero_live_guard_proof,post_freeze_all_plane_root_and_slot_commitment,one_digest_signer_lock_ref,quorum_signatures}`. `RoleTimeIssuanceReservationClosure<Role>` is `Local{own_group_certificate_ref:StrongRef<GroupTimeIssuanceQuiescenceCertificate>,own_reservation_index_ref:StrongRef<TimeSubjectIssuanceReservationIndex<Local>>,own_complete_bijection_proof_ref}|Meta{own_group_certificate_ref,own_reservation_index_ref:StrongRef<TimeSubjectIssuanceReservationIndex<Meta>>,exact_sorted_shard_group_certificate_refs[CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<GroupTimeIssuanceQuiescenceCertificate>],configured_group_certificate_bijection_proof_ref}`. Applying the complete closure changes `IssuanceClosing -> IssuanceQuiescent`; the closing state never points to a future quiescence certificate.

`TimeAuthorityIssuanceFence` is the final portable external direct successor `{external_request_binding:ExternalActionRequestBinding{action_kind=TimeAuthorityIssuanceFence},transition_id,retiring_profile_oid,retiring_authority_epoch,closing_receipt_digest,issuance_closed_registry_head_digest_and_cas_version,retiring_profile_issuer_registry_root_digest,configured_group_set_commitment,sorted_group_closure_projections[{role_and_group,issuance_epoch,last_admitted_local_sequence,reservation_inventory_digest,quiescence_certificate_digest}],exact_group_certificate_bijection_commitment,configured_offline_issuer_epoch_count,sorted_offline_epoch_fences[{issuer_id,mac_key_id,mac_key_epoch,issuer_epoch_configuration_digest,permitted_sequence_and_counter_ranges,fence_receipt_digest,issuer_registry_leaf_proof}],exact_configured_offline_epoch_bijection_commitment,zero_outstanding_issuance_reservation_commitment,closed_at:AuthorityInstant,no_future_root_issuance_under_profile:true,old_signer_set_epoch,old_threshold_signatures,new_threshold_signatures}`. It is obtained only through the intent-owned universal dispatch after the complete reservation closure is visible. Any `SentUnknown` fence attempt is status-resolved before retry. Once the fence may have been sent, abort is permanently illegal and structural transition-completion authority permits roll-forward only. Only after the imported terminal fence evidence exists can subject inventories be cut. Legal attenuation of a pre-fence offline root remains covered by its cohort and may only narrow; a new root after closing/fence is rejected structurally and by the external issuer counter.

`TimeBoundSubjectInventory<Role:Local|Meta|Shard>` is `{inventory_id,role_and_group,retiring_profile_oid,issuance_fence_digest,cut:{root_manifest_identity,winning_slot_generation_and_digest,semantic_protocol_prepared_consensus_root_commitment,current_and_prospective_configuration_commitment},canonical_entries[{subject_key,subject_arm,inventory_subject_identity,canonical_subject_digest,owner_plane_and_slot,profile_oid,not_before,expires_at_or_verify_through,terminal_or_live_state}],online_macaroon_roots:Local{record_refs[StrongRef<MacaroonRootIssuanceRecord<Local>>]}|Meta{record_refs[StrongRef<MacaroonRootIssuanceRecord<Meta>>]}|Shard{uninhabited_empty},offline_issuer_epoch_cohorts[OfflineMacaroonIssuerEpochCohort],complete_slot_and_owner_bitmap,body_digest}`. The ordinary entry set contains every rooted live time-bearing owner exactly once; online macaroon entries are keyed by stable root token ID, offline roots by fenced issuer cohort, and presented/attenuated token byte variants are absent. A Shard cannot originate an online root-issuance record. Local/Shard inventories contain only their own group. `ShardTimeBoundSubjectInventoryCertificate` is `{SameGroupCertificateHeader,transition_id,shard_id,retiring_profile_oid,issuance_fence_digest,group_quiescence_certificate_identity,shard_root_slot_and_all_plane_cut,inventory_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventory<Shard>>,complete_slot_and_owner_bitmap,one_digest_signer_lock_ref,quorum_signatures}`. `TimeBoundSubjectInventoryProof<Role>` is `{inventory_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventory<Role>>,generated_active_time_field_row_count,inventory_entry_count,exact_owner_to_entry_bijection_commitment,online_root_issuance_record_bijection_commitment,offline_cohort_fence_bijection_commitment,issuance_fence_group_and_offline_set_equality_commitment,post_fence_no_new_root_issuance_proof,checker_version,proof_digest}`. `RoleTimeBoundSubjectInventoryClosure<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is `Local{own_inventory_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventory<Local>>,own_proof_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventoryProof<Local>>,closure_digest}|Meta{own_inventory_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventory<Meta>>,own_proof_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventoryProof<Meta>>,exact_sorted_shard_inventory_certificate_refs[CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<ShardTimeBoundSubjectInventoryCertificate>],configured_group_inventory_bijection_proof_ref,aggregate_maximum_expiry_derivation_proof_ref,closure_digest}`. The transition plan signs this closure digest; the drain hold, registry, transition record, checkpoint, and retirement proof retain the exact closure.

External service contracts are portable. `TimeObservationServiceContract` is the signed `{transition_id,retiring_profile_oid_and_digest,time_domain_id,authority_epoch,observation_service_id,challenge_protocol_oid,external_registry_id,served_subject_classes,maximum_uncertainty_ticks:u128,maximum_round_trip_ticks:u128,serve_challenges_through:AuthorityInstant,shutdown_requires_receipt:true,service_key_ids_and_epochs,signer_set_epoch,threshold_signatures}` with no local reference. `OfflineIssuerVerificationServiceContract` is the signed `{issuer_id,mac_key_id,mac_key_epoch,retiring_profile_oid_and_digest,verification_service_id,verification_protocol_oid,verification_key_identity_and_digest,verify_through:AuthorityInstant,shutdown_authority_set,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. Local `TimeObservationServiceRetentionRecord<Role>` pairs the portable contract with `profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>`, service-verifier refs, configuration/checkpoint floor, and body digest. `OfflineIssuerVerificationServiceFloor` is `{transition_id,retiring_profile_oid,sorted_dependencies[{cohort_ref:StrongRef<OfflineMacaroonIssuerEpochCohort>,fence_receipt_ref:StrongRef<OfflineMacaroonIssuerEpochFenceReceipt>,portable_service_contract_ref:StrongRef<OfflineIssuerVerificationServiceContract>,verification_key_ref:StrongRef<DurableCapabilityVerifierKey>,verify_through:AuthorityInstant}],exact_fenced_epoch_bijection_commitment,configuration_and_checkpoint_floor_commitment,body_digest}`. `TimeAuthorityDrainHold<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is `{transition_id,retiring_profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,issuance_fence_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityIssuanceFence>,inventory_closure_ref:StrongRef<RoleTimeBoundSubjectInventoryClosure<Role>>,observation_service_retention_record_ref:StrongRef<TimeObservationServiceRetentionRecord<Role>>,verifier_key_refs[StrongRef<DurableCapabilityVerifierKey>],offline_issuer_verify_only_service_floor_ref:StrongRef<OfflineIssuerVerificationServiceFloor>,maximum_old_subject_expiry:AuthorityInstant,old_observation_and_verification_live_through:AuthorityInstant,body_digest}`.

The retirement support types are generated closed unions from `time_bound_subjects.toml`. `TimeSubjectTerminalEvidenceRef<Role>`, `TimeBoundSuccessorRef<Role>`, and `TimeSubjectTombstoneRef<Role>` each have one exact typed arm per applicable subject row; generic refs, digest-only arms, and role substitution are forbidden. A tombstone retains `{role,terminal_authority_commitment,old_subject_key,old_body_and_profile_digest,terminal_or_successor_commitment,no_current_owner_and_nonreuse_proof}` but no strong ref to the old subject and cannot authorize use. `TimeSubjectDisposition<Role>` is exactly `Terminal{typed_terminal_evidence_ref:TimeSubjectTerminalEvidenceRef<Role>}|Expired{time_validation_evidence_ref:StrongRef<TimeValidationEvidence>}|Reissued{successor_subject_key,typed_successor_ref:TimeBoundSuccessorRef<Role>,nonwidening_proof_ref:StrongRef<AuthorityNonwideningProof>,old_identity_tombstone_ref:TimeSubjectTombstoneRef<Role>}`.

`RoleConfigurationRetentionBasis<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is the generated exact union `Local{current_configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>,joint_configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>?,prospective_configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>?,config_payload_floor_ref:StrongRef<ConfigPayloadFloor>,checkpoint_ref:StrongRef<RecoveryCheckpoint>,root_manifest_and_slot_cut,configuration_set_digest}|Meta{current_configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>,joint_configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>?,prospective_configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>?,meta_config_payload_floor_ref:StrongRef<MetaConfigPayloadFloor>,global_checkpoint_ref:StrongRef<GlobalRecoveryCheckpoint>,exact_current_and_prospective_shard_configuration_commitment,root_manifest_and_slot_cut,configuration_set_digest}`. Every configuration proposal, joint-state transition, retirement floor, topology change, and role transition consults a live ClosingRequested/IssuanceClosing/IssuanceQuiescent/Draining hold and must preserve the exact current-plus-prospective group closure or wait. V1 categorically forbids Local-to-Sharded role transition while any time profile is ClosingRequested, IssuanceClosing, IssuanceQuiescent, or Draining. The profile must first reach Retired or return to the unchanged ActiveForIssuance state through the legal pre-send abort; no migration-proof exception exists in v1.

Activation and retirement floors are deliberately different. `RoleTimeAuthorityDrainFloorSet<Role>` is `Local{checkpoint_ref:StrongRef<RecoveryCheckpoint>,configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>,config_payload_floor_ref:StrongRef<ConfigPayloadFloor>,drain_hold_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityDrainHold<Local>>}|Meta{global_checkpoint_ref:StrongRef<GlobalRecoveryCheckpoint>,configuration_ref:StrongRef<ConfigurationState>,meta_config_payload_floor_ref:StrongRef<MetaConfigPayloadFloor>,drain_hold_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityDrainHold<Meta>>,exact_sorted_shard_quiescence_and_inventory_certificate_refs[CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<ShardTimeBoundSubjectInventoryCertificate>]}`. `ShardTimeAuthorityRetirementFloor` is `{SameGroupCertificateHeader,transition_id,shard_id,retiring_profile_oid,inventory_certificate_ref:StrongRef<ShardTimeBoundSubjectInventoryCertificate>,retirement_proof_ref:StrongRef<ShardTimeBoundSubjectRetirementProof>,retained_profile_verifier_and_offline_issuer_dependencies,retain_through:AuthorityInstant,configuration_checkpoint_and_root_slot_cut,one_digest_signer_lock_ref,quorum_signatures}`; it is built after the proof, while the proof names only the precomputed floor body digest. `RoleTimeAuthorityRetirementFloorSet<Role>` is `Local{checkpoint_ref,configuration_ref,config_payload_floor_ref,shutdown_receipt_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityShutdownReceipt>,verifier_retirement_floor_ref:StrongRef<VerifierKeyRetirementFloor>,retirement_proof_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectRetirementProof<Local>>}|Meta{global_checkpoint_ref,configuration_ref,meta_config_payload_floor_ref,shutdown_receipt_ref,verifier_retirement_floor_ref,retirement_proof_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectRetirementProof<Meta>>,exact_sorted_shard_retirement_ack_refs[CertifiedRemoteStrongRef<ShardTimeAuthorityRetirementAck>]}`. Role-invalid arms are uninhabited.

`ShardTimeBoundSubjectRetirementProof` is `{transition_id,shard_inventory_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventory<Shard>>,sorted_dispositions[TimeSubjectDisposition<Shard>],inventory_disposition_bijection_commitment,no_live_old_profile_subject_proof,precomputed_retirement_floor_body_digest,checker_version,proof_digest}` and contains no future floor or ack. `TimeBoundSubjectRetirementProof<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is `{transition_record_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityEpochTransitionRecord<Role>>,current_inventory_ref:StrongRef<TimeBoundSubjectInventory<Role>>,sorted_dispositions[TimeSubjectDisposition<Role>],inventory_disposition_bijection_commitment,no_post_fence_root_subject_proof,configured_shard_retirement_ack_commitment,checker_version,proof_digest}`.

Retirement compacts its proof closure at the visibility boundary. `TimeSubjectTerminalProjection` is the reference-free closed arm `Terminal{subject_key,subject_body_and_profile_digest,typed_terminal_evidence_identity_and_digest,terminal_authority_commitment}|Expired{subject_key,subject_body_and_profile_digest,portable_expiry_attestation_identity_and_digest,terminal_authority_commitment}|Reissued{old_subject_key,old_body_and_profile_digest,successor_subject_key_and_public_commitment,nonwidening_proof_digest,old_identity_tombstone_digest}`. `TimeAuthorityTransitionTerminalSummary<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is `{role_and_group,transition_id,retired_profile_identity_and_digest,successor_profile_identity_and_digest,terminal_authority_commitment:TerminalAuthorityCommitment<Role>,rotation_intent_digest,close_fence_registry_operation_and_terminal_evidence_commitment,transition_plan_and_receipt_digest,transition_record_digest,retirement_operation_and_applied_identity,shutdown_receipt_and_verifier_floor_commitment,configuration_and_shard_floor_commitment,sorted_subject_terminal_projections[TimeSubjectTerminalProjection],inventory_to_terminal_projection_bijection_commitment,zero_live_old_profile_subject_commitment,retired_at_registry_generation,body_digest}`. It is built as the retirement command's compact result before the successor payload/root, contains no live authority header and no strong edge to the intent, transition record, inventory, dispositions, subjects, drain hold, dispatch attempts, or administrative decision, and cannot authorize validation or issuance. Detailed retirement inputs remain rooted only through the retirement command's audit-visibility and activated-cut floors; once those floors close, the registry retains solely this summary and the separately required public transparency/audit commitments.

`PortableTimeExpiryAttestation` is the signed, reference-free canonical-role form `{origin:CanonicalRole,subject_kind,subject_identity_and_body_digest,time_authority_profile_oid,time_domain_id,authority_epoch,expires_at:AuthorityInstant,challenged_observation_digest,observation_interval:AuthorityInterval,validation_digest,intended_terminal_action_digest,external_registry_head_digest_and_cas_version,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. It is emitted only after durable local `TimeValidationEvidence::Expired`; a same-role import record retains that evidence and proves byte equality. External receipts/certificates use only this portable attestation, never a local `StrongRef<TimeValidationEvidence>`.

The pre-first-root restore machine has distinct exact artifacts. `PreBootstrapTimeValidationEvidence` is `{restore_id,journal_id,prebootstrap_time_basis_digest,subject_kind,subject_identity_and_body_digest,portable_observation_bytes_and_digest,local_challenge_round_trip_witness,profile_domain_epoch_and_window,intended_action_digest,result:Usable|Expired{proof_observation_interval_earliest_gte_expires_at},journal_head_and_generation,mac_under_k_restore_journal}`. `PreBootstrapPortableTimeExpiryAttestation` is the reference-free signed `{origin:RestorePreBootstrap,restore_id,journal_id,subject_kind,subject_identity_and_body_digest,time_authority_profile_oid,time_domain_id,authority_epoch,expires_at,challenged_observation_digest,observation_interval,prebootstrap_validation_evidence_digest,intended_terminal_action_digest,prebootstrap_time_basis_digest,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. It is emitted only after the matching MAC-authenticated Expired artifact is journal-authority durable. Neither prebootstrap type decodes as canonical `TimeValidationEvidence`/`PortableTimeExpiryAttestation`, and neither authorizes post-bootstrap time use.

`TimeAuthorityShutdownReceipt` is the portable signed `{transition_id,retiring_profile_oid,observation_service_id,served_through:AuthorityInstant,shutdown_after:AuthorityInstant,final_registry_head_digest_and_cas_version,shutdown_counter,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. `VerifierKeyRetirementFloor` is `{transition_id,retiring_profile_oid,sorted_verifier_and_offline_issuer_key_dependencies,zero_live_subject_dependency_commitment,retain_through:AuthorityInstant,shutdown_receipt_digest,configuration_and_checkpoint_floor_commitment,signer_set_epoch,signatures}`. `ShardTimeAuthorityRetirementAck` is `{SameGroupCertificateHeader,transition_id,shard_id,retiring_profile_oid,inventory_certificate_identity,zero_live_old_profile_subject_proof_ref:StrongRef<ShardTimeBoundSubjectRetirementProof>,installed_retirement_floor_ref:StrongRef<ShardTimeAuthorityRetirementFloor>,post_apply_root_and_slot_commitment,one_digest_signer_lock_ref,quorum_signatures}`.

The cross-authority handoff is deliberately split. Portable pre-CAS `TimeAuthorityEpochTransitionPlan` is `{external_request_binding:ExternalActionRequestBinding{action_kind=TimeAuthorityRegistryTransition},transition_id,rotation_intent_digest,predecessor_profile_oid_and_digest,successor_profile_oid_and_digest,issuance_closing_receipt_digest,issuance_fence_digest,subject_inventory_closure_digest,drain_hold_digest,predecessor_external_registry_head_digest_and_cas_version,old_final_challenged_interval:AuthorityInterval,new_initial_challenged_interval:AuthorityInterval,old_observation_service_and_verification_key_live_through:AuthorityInstant,successor_activation_not_before:AuthorityInstant,maximum_old_subject_expiry:AuthorityInstant,old_and_new_signer_set_epochs,dual_signed_handoff_transcript,old_threshold_signatures,new_threshold_signatures}`. Each interval is internally same-domain/same-epoch; the transcript relates the two authorities without comparing ticks. The registry CAS runs through the intent-owned universal dispatch and returns portable `TimeAuthorityRegistryTransitionReceipt {external_request_binding:ExternalActionRequestBinding{action_kind=TimeAuthorityRegistryTransition},transition_id,plan_digest,prior_head_digest,prior_cas_version,returned_head_digest,returned_cas_version,returned_active_profile_oid,old_signer_set_epoch,new_signer_set_epoch,old_signature_set,new_signature_set}`. `PortableTimeAuthorityRegistryTransitionTerminalEvidence` is the reference-free `{external_request_binding,transition_id,operation_id,idempotency_key_digest,canonical_full_request_digest,dispatch_attempt_generation,source_gate_publication_commitment,status_lineage,terminal_disposition:Applied{receipt_digest,returned_head_digest,returned_cas_version}|AlreadyApplied{receipt_digest,returned_head_digest,returned_cas_version},provider_counter,signatures}`. Status-first recovery and exact idempotency are mandatory. Local `TimeAuthorityEpochTransitionRecord<Role:AuthorityOwningRole>` is `{role,completion_authority:TimeAuthorityTransitionCompletionAuthority<Role>,authority_bound_header:AuthorityBoundHeader<Role>,rotation_intent_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRotationIntentRecord<Role>>,original_admin_authorization_decision_ref:StrongRef<AuthorizationDecisionRecord<Role>>,plan_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityEpochTransitionPlan>,registry_dispatch_terminal_evidence_ref:StrongRef<PortableTimeAuthorityRegistryTransitionTerminalEvidence>,receipt_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityRegistryTransitionReceipt>,predecessor_profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,successor_profile_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityProfile>,issuance_fence_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityIssuanceFence>,subject_inventory_closure_ref:StrongRef<RoleTimeBoundSubjectInventoryClosure<Role>>,drain_hold_ref:StrongRef<TimeAuthorityDrainHold<Role>>,configuration_retention_basis:RoleConfigurationRetentionBasis<Role>,drain_floor_set:RoleTimeAuthorityDrainFloorSet<Role>,plan_and_receipt_byte_match_digest,body_digest}`.
